utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 keys are present. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan specifies PrimeCare Premium Plan for Physical Health at €200/month and for Mental Health at €130/month, with brief coverage features. This is fully specified. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan has 'N/A', so it is not included. 3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan has 'N/A', so it is not included. 4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes telemedicine add-on at €10/month, which is fully specified. 5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan gives €340/month but no annual figure; however, the requirement says 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown'—this implies both monthly and/or annual. Since only monthly is provided, this may be considered incomplete. Given the instruction, we should treat it as not fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items: health_coverage and additional_services. Total included: 2 out of 5.
